brief_name: Harbor Energy v. Cascade Grid (W.D. Wash.)

errors.description: Section I: 'see Anderson' starts a citation sentence after a period — should be capitalized 'See'
Section I: 'Cf. Scott v. Harris' appears mid-string-cite after a semicolon — should be lowercase 'cf.'
Section I: 'With Saucier' — capitalized 'With' is invalid; the Compare/with construction uses lowercase 'with'
Section I: 'but Cf. United States Department of Justice' — should be 'but cf.' (both lowercase mid-string-cite)
Section I: 'contra Smith' starts a new citation sentence — should be capitalized 'Contra'
Section IV / Section I: 'Department' must be abbreviated 'Dep't' per T6
Section IV: 'National' must be abbreviated 'Nat'l' per T6
Section IV: 'Federation' must be abbreviated 'Fed'n' per T6
Section IV: 'Independent' must be abbreviated 'Indep.' per T6
Section IV: 'Government' must be abbreviated 'Gov't' per T6
Section IV: 'Authority' must be abbreviated 'Auth.' per T6
Section IV: 'Public Citizen' — 'Public' should be abbreviated 'Pub.' per T6
Section II: a 12-word quotation is wrongly formatted as a block quote — block format requires 50+ words per R. 5.1
anchor_substrings: plaintiff's burden at this stage is well-defined

errors.description: Section II: ellipsis 'statements...are' lacks proper spacing — should be 'statements . . . are' per R. 5.3
Section IV: 'Transportation' must be abbreviated 'Transp.' per T6
Section II: second ellipsis 'facts...the' lacks proper spacing per R. 5.3
Section III: 'The Court of Appeals for the Ninth Circuit' generic capitalization — should be lowercase 'court of appeals' per R. 8 unless preceded by 'United States'
